name: Chain-Type Exospine
effect: Boosts combo attack power, crit damage, and crit rate on high-level combos.
bestFor: Melee combo builds and sustained DPS.

name: Grenadier-Type Exospine
effect: Increases combat consumable damage, effect, and area of effect.
bestFor: Grenade-focused crowd control against normal enemies.

name: Protection-Type Exospine
effect: Reduces incoming damage, raises shield protection level, and can restore HP while guarding at low health.
bestFor: Beginners or anyone who needs extra survivability.

name: Impact-Type Exospine
effect: Raises crit rate and unleashes chained unstable energy on critical hits.
bestFor: Fighting groups of enemies and crit-heavy builds.

name: Camouflage-Type Exospine
effect: Reduces enemy detection range, boosts melee power after executions, and restores HP on successful execution.

name: Eagle Eye-Type Exospine
effect: Boosts ranged attack power, increases ammo capacity, and can recover ammo when hitting weaknesses from a distance.

name: Reflex-Type Exospine
effect: Regenerates shield faster while guarding and makes Perfect Dodge and Perfect Parry easier.
bestFor: Learning the combat timing and defensive play.

name: Burst Trance-Type Exospine
effect: Increases max Burst Energy, Burst Skill attack power, and recharges Burst Energy during high-level combos.

name: Beta Trance-Type Exospine
effect: Increases Beta Energy recharge, Beta Skill attack power, and can place you in a trance where Beta Skills cost no energy.
bestFor: Beta-skill spam builds using Triplet, Slash, and Shield Breaker.

name: Recovery-Type Exospine
effect: Increases all recovery effects, reduces damage taken after using a potion, and recovers Beta Energy when using potions.
bestFor: Long exploration runs and sustained boss fights.

name: Suppression-Type Exospine
effect: Increases shield penetration, extends downed duration, and boosts damage to downed enemies.

name: Judgement-Type Exospine
effect: Accelerates Tachy Energy charge, reduces Tachy Energy consumption, and damages nearby enemies when manually leaving Tachy Mode.
